name: Mussels in Black Bean Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. SCRUB THE MUSSELS UNDER COLD water and pull off the wirelike beards.
2. SOAK THEM in a large bowl in several changes of cold water.
3. DRAIN THEM THOROUGHLY JUST BEFORE COOKING.
4. HEAT A WOK OR SKILLET UNTIL HOT; ADD OIL.
5. ADD GARLIC, GINGER AND BLACK BEANS; STIR-FRY FOR 30 SECONDS.
6. ADD BEAN SAUCE AND CHILI BEAN SAUCE; STIR-FRY FOR ANOTHER 10 SECONDS.
7. ADD MUSSELS AND STIR-FRY FOR 1 MINUTE.
8. ADD RICE WINE, SOY SAUCE AND STOCK. COOK OVER HIGH HEAT UNTIL THE SHELLS ARE COMPLETELY OPEN.
9. DISCARD UNOPENED MUSSELS.
10. GARNISH WITH CHOPPED SCALLIONS AND SERVE IMMEDIATELY.
